title: Staff: Olatunde Aladesote
staff_title: Assistant, Research Compliance, Office of Research Administration
content:
Mr. Olatunde Aladesote is the Assistant, Research Compliance, Office of Research Administration.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304E. Email: olatunde.aladesote@morgan.edu.

Mr. Olatunde Aladesote is a Research Compliance Specialist in the Division of Research & Economic Development (DRED).

His role is to ensure that all applicants comply with federal and state laws including Morgan State University research policies. He is responsible for Institutional Review Board (IRB) application processing and provides prompt remediation to all IRB correspondence.

Mr. Aladesote also attends to research inquiries, meeting report writing, and disseminates information to various IRB members' departments.

Education: D.Eng. in Civil Engineering, Morgan State University (Candidate); M.Eng. in Civil Engineering, Morgan State University.
